sub_modules.fp_add_unpack: Unpacks IEEE-754 operands and detects zero, infinity, and NaN cases.
sub_modules.fp_add_align: Aligns significands to the larger exponent and preserves sticky information.
sub_modules.fp_add_significand: Applies add/subtract sign control and performs significand addition or magnitude subtraction.
sub_modules.fp_add_normalize: Normalizes the intermediate significand and updates exponent and overflow state.
sub_modules.fp_add_round_pack: Rounds to nearest even, handles special cases, and packs the IEEE-754 result.
